text:
Medicare does not limit the number of continuous 60-day recertifications for 
beneficiaries who continue to be eligible for the home health benefit. The certification 
may cover a period less than but not greater than 60 days. Because the updated home 
health plan of care must include the frequency and duration of visits to be made, the 
physician or allowed practitioner does not have to estimate how much longer skilled 
services will be needed for the recertification. 

30.5.3 - Who May Sign
